calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion Motion To Enforce Settlement
Off Calendar May-06-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Tong Mu's unopposed Motion To Enforce Settlement is DENIED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Moving party is ordered to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the above text and email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the time set for hearing.

No proposed order received. Moving party failed to provide and follow the court's order.

Counsel for the moving party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Apr-22-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs SALLY SWANSON AN INDIVIDUAL, SALLY SWANSON ARCHITECT, INC.'s MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD.

Grant. No opposition filed. Order is signed.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/REQ)
